# AVCustomRoutingActionItem

**Class**

An object that represents a custom action item to display in a device route picker.

## Declaration

```swift
class AVCustomRoutingActionItem
```

## Overview

Use this class to specify supplemental action items to display in the list of discovered routes. Tapping a custom item dismisses the picker and calls the [doc://com.apple.avrouting/documentation/AVRouting/AVCustomRoutingControllerDelegate/customRoutingController(_:didSelect:)] method of [doc://com.apple.avrouting/documentation/AVRouting/AVCustomRoutingControllerDelegate].

## Configuring an item

- **type**: A type with an identifier that matches a value in the app’s configuration.
- **overrideTitle**: A string to use to override the title of the item’s type.

## Media routing

- **AVCustomRoutingController**: An object that manages the connection from a device to a destination.
- **AVCustomRoutingControllerDelegate**: A protocol for delegates of a custom routing controller.
- **AVCustomRoutingEvent**: An object that represents an event that occurs on a route.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
